# openai_project_hosted_tool_permissions (Data Source)

Retrieve project hosted tool permissions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_project_hosted_tool_permissions" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id

### Read-Only

- `code_interpreter_enabled` (Boolean) code interpreter enabled
- `file_search_enabled` (Boolean) file search enabled
- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `image_generation_enabled` (Boolean) image generation enabled
- `mcp_enabled` (Boolean) mcp enabled
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `web_search_enabled` (Boolean) web search enabled
